cfg.debug_logging.name: Debug Logging
cfg.debug_logging.desc: Write detailed diagnostic info to the BepInEx log while you play. Turn this on before reporting a bug so the log has the context I need to help.
cfg.require_farmer_perk.name: Require Farmer Perk
cfg.require_farmer_perk.desc: On: nearby garden plots only mass-harvest after you've unlocked the Farmer perk in the tech tree. This matches the mod's original behaviour. Off: every harvest immediately reaps neighbouring plots of the same crop, even before the perk is unlocked - useful if you want the convenience from day one.
cfg.cascade_radius_tiles.name: Cascade Radius (tiles)
cfg.cascade_radius_tiles.desc: How far the harvest cascade reaches from the bed you clicked, measured in game tiles. 1 catches the 8 beds touching it (3x3 = 9 beds total). 2 catches a 5x5 (25 beds). Larger values pull in more neighbours but check more world objects per harvest, so leave this low unless you have very large plots.
cfg.check_for_updates.name: Check for Updates
cfg.check_for_updates.desc: Show a notice on the main menu when a newer version of this mod is available on NexusMods. Click the notice to open the mod's page.
Stage1Des: Enhances your gardening skills to automatically harvest the plots surrounding the plot you're working on.
